name: TES_Ta_Absorber_Stack_side_entry
install: Rigidly rotate the existing DEMO2 TES module so layer depth lies along the side-entry beam; do not change pixel count, pixel size, layer spacing, or material.
why_for_sim: Primary 511 keV science detector and dominant detection-efficiency mass.
size_basis: Same DEMO2 TES convention: 6 layers, 376 Ta pixels/layer, 3 mm absorber depth; only global orientation changes.

name: Si_Substrate_Stack_side_entry
install: Rigidly rotated with the TES stack; each Si substrate sits downstream of its absorber along +x.
why_for_sim: Captures substrate scattering/activation and mechanical support behind each TES layer.
size_basis: Unchanged DEMO2 substrate radius/thickness; local coordinate changed only by rotation.

name: Cu_SubstrateSupport_OpenRing_L1
install: Open Cu ring immediately behind a substrate layer; it supports the substrate edge but leaves the TES/beam footprint open.
why_for_sim: Replaces the old continuous rail with a low-Cu edge support so no copper plate lies under the whole detector stack.
size_basis: Outer radius matches 2.2 cm substrate; inner radius 1.85 cm clears 1.8 cm TES active footprint, so the requested 1 cm ring was reduced because it would cover active TES area.
params: {"x_center_cm": -2.65, "r_in_cm": 1.85, "r_out_cm": 2.2, "thickness_cm": 0.3, "axis_y_cm": 0.0, "axis_z_cm": -5.2, "behind_substrate": true, "clearance_logic": "inner radius 1.85 cm clears TES active radius 1.80 cm"}

name: Cu_ColdFinger_OffAxis_YP_ZP_from_Disk_to_Stem
install: One of four symmetric off-axis Cu thermal fingers from the downstream support disk to a matching vertical stem.
why_for_sim: Provides thermal conductance without placing a Cu finger on the 511 keV beam axis.
size_basis: Four 1.6 mm radius fingers give nearly the same total cross-section as the previous single 3.2 mm radius center finger; radial offset is large enough to clear the beam axis but remains inside the 2.2 cm support disk.
source_tag: User requested four symmetric edge-biased but not edge-clipped thermal fingers + Cu-64 mitigation

size_basis: Inner radius clears 2.2 cm substrates plus harness and rail; 0.5 mm Nb wall is a superconducting magnetic shield proxy.

name: DR_MixingChamber_Cu
install: Mixing chamber mounted just above the MXC plate; cold-at-bottom orientation is preserved.
why_for_sim: Nominal DR component providing the 50 mK thermal stage. Mass matters for local activation/scatter.
size_basis: z=0.31..2.11, 1 mm above MXC plate; size is a compact detector-head proxy, not full vendor CAD.

name: DR_MXC_Sinter_HEX_AgProxy
install: Annular silver-sinter equivalent around mixing chamber.
why_for_sim: Heat-exchanger mass and possible activation material close to TES.
size_basis: 50% dense Ag proxy; kept close to MXC body.

name: DR_Continuous_HEX_CuNi_MXC_to_CP
install: First segment of the continuous heat exchanger coil.
why_for_sim: Represents CuNi tubing mass; segmented so it does not unrealistically pass through plates.
size_basis: Actual tube length is coiled around circumference; z footprint is flight compact.

name: DR_Continuous_HEX_CuNi_CP_to_Still
install: Second segment of the continuous heat exchanger coil.
why_for_sim: Same function as previous, split at the CP plate with real clearance/ports left for CSG.
size_basis: Segmented per stage gap; 12 cm commercial spacing retained as systematic.

name: DR_Still_Pot_Cu
install: Still pot hung below the still plate.
why_for_sim: Essential DR component and local Cu activation/scattering source.
size_basis: z=9.0..10.6, 1 mm below still plate bottom.

name: DR_Still_Heater_SS_ring
install: Still heater/support ring around the pot.
why_for_sim: Adds SS structural/electrical hardware at the still stage for activation bookkeeping.
size_basis: Thin ring proxy; exact heater wire not modeled.

name: DR_4K_Condenser_Cu
install: 4 K condenser/pre-cooling part below the 4 K plate.
why_for_sim: Necessary DR plumbing mass and activation source.
size_basis: z=18.4..19.6, clear of 4 K plate.

name: DR_60K_Charcoal_Trap
install: Charcoal/cold-trap proxy at first-stage intercept.
why_for_sim: Represents cold cleanup/trap hardware used in dry/closed-cycle DR plumbing.
size_basis: z=26.3..28.5, clear of the 60 K plate.

name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_MXC_CP
install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, MXC to CP.
why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_CP_Still
install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, CP to still.
why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_Still_4K
install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, still to 4 K.
why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

name: DR_Capillary_CuNi_4K_60K
install: Segmented CuNi inlet/return capillary mass, 4 K to 60 K.
why_for_sim: Prevents the v1/v3 error of long pipes unrealistically cutting through plates.
size_basis: Routed in the corresponding stage gap and stepped outward with shield radius.

name: DR_Still_PumpLine_SS_to_300K_top
install: Still pumping/service line rises to the 300 K top lid inside the vacuum jacket at +x, not through the optical side aperture.
why_for_sim: Retains correct commercial DR service topology without forcing a top optical bore.
size_basis: SS line kept as a local proxy; external pump/gas handling is platform-level systematic.
source_tag: Bluefors DR topology + user side-entry constraint

name: PreCool_FlexLink_Cu_remote_interface
install: Flexible Cu link to remote precooler/PT interface, placed high in the 60 K/4 K region.
why_for_sim: Keeps a local cold-head interface mass without adding full PT/compressor mass to the detector-head nominal.
size_basis: PT cold head remains non-nominal because dry-DR PT mass/power is a platform decision.

name: SQUID_uMUX_Box_Al_relocated_offbeam_minimal
install: Readout box relocated to the +y/+x off-beam corner; it is not between TES layers.
why_for_sim: TES/SQUID readout hardware is a local scattering/activation source and must not be omitted.
size_basis: Same box dimensions and mass as v3p5; only placement changed to remove 2D-projection ambiguity.
source_tag: DIXE TES+SQUID detector assembly + DEMO2 readout proxy

name: NbTi_Bundle_bay_to_MXC

why_for_sim: Readout wiring mass is needed for activation/scattering and thermal intercept modeling.
size_basis: Segmented by stage gap; 0.17 azimuth fraction gives a ~0.3 kg-class total wiring proxy.

name: Passive_Cu_Liner_detector_bay
install: Thin Cu liner outside the OVC but inside the CsI veto, in the detector-bay region only. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
why_for_sim: Graded-Z inner layer and local passive mass for fluorescence/scattering studies.
size_basis: 0.8 mm Cu, bay-limited so it does not wrap the full upper DR tower.

name: Passive_W_Liner_detector_bay
install: Thin W liner outside the Cu liner, bay-limited. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
why_for_sim: High-Z passive shield proxy while avoiding W as the material closest to TES.
size_basis: 0.7 mm W; side hole declared for the beam sleeve.
source_tag: DEMO2 graded-Z policy + balloon gamma shielding practice

name: Passive_W_Bottom_Plate_detector_bay
install: W bottom plate just below the OVC bottom and above the CsI bottom panel.
why_for_sim: Hardens upward atmospheric/secondary photon path under the detector bay.
size_basis: 0.2 cm W floor with 0.05 cm clearances to adjacent shells in the proxy layout.

name: W_Side_Aperture_Sleeve_collimator
install: 2 cm thick W sleeve through the side aperture of the CsI veto, aligned with the Laue focus beam. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
why_for_sim: Defines the local side-entry aperture and suppresses low-energy off-axis leakage through the veto penetration.
size_basis: Inner radius follows 1.95 cm shield hole; outer radius leaves 0.5 mm clearance inside the 2.60 cm CsI side hole; axial thickness reduced from 4 cm to 2 cm because the side-entry sleeve is a local leakage suppressor rather than a long high-aspect-ratio pixel collimator.

name: CsI_Side_Segment_00
install: One of eight CsI side-veto segments outside the cryostat; segment 04 carries the side beam aperture.
why_for_sim: Active anticoincidence for local charged/Compton background around the detector bay only; not wrapped around the entire upper DR service tower.
size_basis: 4 cm radial side thickness preserves original DEMO2 nominal side shield and keeps mass near the old 65 kg scale; 6/8 cm scan is mandatory.
source_tag: 511-CAM small shielded focal-plane concept + DEMO2 CsI policy

install: Al support/readout backplane outside the CsI side panels. Side port is an explicit CSG aperture in this minimal patch.
why_for_sim: Active shield is not bare scintillator; packaging/readout mass affects local background.
size_basis: 1 mm Al shell outside side CsI panels; bay-limited.

name: ActiveShield_Flex_Kapton_detector_bay

name: Outer_Al_Mechanical_Shell_detector_bay

why_for_sim: Mechanical shell/support proxy and local activation/scattering mass; not a pressure vessel.
size_basis: 3 mm Al bay cover with top annulus around the cryostat tower and side aperture for the beam.
